4. **Platinum Rewards Card** - The title says "Earning 4% Cash Back" but the content says "You earn 10.0% cash back on all eligible purchases" with $200 annual fee. There seems to be a discrepancy in the doc. The title says 4% but the content says 10.0%. Let me check more.
5. **Diamond Elite Card** - 5.0% cash back on all purchases. Need annual fee.

Actually, looking more carefully at the Platinum Rewards Card doc, the title says "Earning 4% Cash Back" but the content says "You earn 10.0% cash back on all eligible purchases." This is confusing. Let me search for the official overview/landing page for the Platinum Rewards Card.
